name: vite-plugin-federation
description: A Vite plugin for Module Federation.

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts && pnpm test:e2e:shared && pnpm test:e2e:dts:dev
scripts.test:e2e:shared: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-shared-strict-fallback-app build && pnpm --filter example-shared-host-only-remote build && pnpm --filter example-shared-host-only-host build && pnpm --filter example-shared-negotiation-remote build && pnpm --filter example-shared-negotiation-host build && playwright test --config playwright.shared.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ssr: pnpm build && pnpm --filter example-react-remote build && pnpm --filter example-react-ssr-host build && playwright test --config playwright.ssr.config.ts
